name: Kiata Wind Farm
current_developer: Kiata ProjectCo Pty Ltd atf Kiata Project Trust
notable: 31 MW, 9 Vestas V126-3.45 MW turbines, 50 km NW of Horsham, VIC. Developed by Windlab; now owned by Atmos Renewables. Set a 65% monthly capacity factor record for a Victorian wind farm. COD December 2017.

timeline.title: Construction commenced
timeline.detail: Tilt Renewables began construction in western Victoria

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.
